prose: Fukui electrophilicity index (f⁺) for pyridine nitrogen atom computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier 'standard', no density fitting) in gas phase at charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF. Geometry: input structure with 11 atoms (pyridine ring + 5 hydrogens). Fukui indices calculated from Mulliken population analysis of the neutral molecule and its N±1 charged states (cation and anion both multiplicity 2, derived from singlet parent). SCF converged. Charge conservation checks passed. The nitrogen atom (atom index 0, label 1) is the most electrophilic site with f⁺ = 0.48423, indicating strong susceptibility to nucleophilic attack. No experimental or literature comparison is offered; the reported value is the computed result only.
